scenes.text: I still have it saved. The last voicemail. It's nothing special. Just them saying, hey, call me back when you get a chance.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a smartphone screen showing a voicemail notification, timestamp visible, warm lamp light in a dark room, shallow depth of field, emotional, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Twelve seconds long. I've listened to it maybe a hundred times.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a finger hovering over a play button on a phone voicemail screen, the progress bar showing 0:12, warm dim lighting, shallow depth of field, intimate, emotional, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Not for what they said. For the way they breathed between words. That little pause before they hung up.
scenes.image_prompt: Audio waveform visualization on a phone screen in a dark room, soft blue glow on the person's face, eyes closed listening, intimate close-up, cinematic, emotional, shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: Sometimes I play it on speaker and just sit there. Letting their voice fill the room one more time.
scenes.image_prompt: Person sitting alone on the edge of a bed in a dimly lit room, phone placed on the nightstand on speaker, warm golden lamp light, deeply emotional, solitude, cinematic, shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: Twelve seconds. That's all I have left. And it's everything.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone lying on a wooden table, screen glowing softly showing the voicemail ended, a single photo frame blurred in the background, warm emotional lighting, cinematic, nostalgic, shallow depth of field, 4k
